THE COURT ORDERED THE WEDNESDAY'S ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO THE FOLLOWING DAY SO THAT IT WILL BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS BRAYTON'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. THE 8/18/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/10. THE 10/20/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 10/21/10. THE 12/15/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 12/16/10. THE COURT CONFER WITH COUNSEL RE TIMELINES FOR DEMAND EXCHANGE. A HEARING IS SET FOR 5/13/10 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT. 206 FOR COMMENTS. RESPONSES ARE DUE BY 5/7/10 AND MAY BE FILED UNDER THE COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION, CASE #828684. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK (206) COURT REPORTER KIM RICHARDSON, CSR #5915, IS PRESENT FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE'S COUNSEL, BERRY & BERRY.

Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Continued To Apr-15-10 At 01:35 P.M. In Dept 206

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of Two Minors - Carl & Elizabeth Whiteley.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Young S. Lee, Esq. appeared for petitioner Leonard Whiteley, the Guardian Ad Litem for the minors, Carl Whiteley and Elizabeth Whiteley.
Ordere waiving the Guarian Ad Litem's appearance at today's hearing was filed on January 25, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Carl Whiteley:

Settlement Amount - $8,768.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,192.00.
Costs - $86.00.

The net balance of $$6,490.00 shall to be deposited into a blocked account with Rabobank, located at 1207 Maricope Highway, Ojai, CA 03023-3128. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

As to Elizabeth Whiteley:

Settlement Amount - $8,768.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,192.00.
Costs - $86.00.

The net balance of $$6,490.00 shall to be deposited into a blocked account with Rabobank, located at 1207 Maricope Highway, Ojai, CA 03023-3128. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On The Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion Apportionment Proceeding and for an Order to Distribute settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Young S. Lee, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Michael Whitteker, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the moving papaers, the Court granted the Motion, signing an Order for same in open court, see details of the Order in scanned doc.
